acceptance_checks: ATT&CK mapping sheet present with per-technique justifications and timeline refs; only techniques with direct evidence are claimed.
Runbook contains explicit restart gates with numeric/mode checks.
Workbook includes labeled charts with threshold lines and breach annotations.
Time zone and +/-1 min tolerance stated consistently in both artifacts.
CSV exports present for all workbook sheets.
ATT&CK mapping sheet present with per-technique justifications and timeline refs; only techniques with direct evidence are claimed.

planned_changes: Workbook: Add/verify Timeline sheet header with time zone and +/-1 min sync tolerance; cross-link key events to runbook sections.
Workbook: Create Tag_Change_Diff sheet (tag, old_value, new_value, unit, timestamp, writer/source, evidence_ref) including C240_REFLUX_SP and C240_REBOILER_LIMIT changes.
Workbook: Build Safety_Margins charts with threshold lines (8.4 MW, 2.6/2.9 bar) and labeled breach regions; add callouts tied to Timeline rows.

Workbook: Add ATTACK_ICS_Mapping sheet listing technique ID/name/tactic, justification, and evidence refs (Timeline row/cell). Claim T0859 and T0836; include T0881 only if historian disablement source and timing are evidenced; omit T0880 and T0878 unless new, concrete evidence is cited.
Workbook: Add Source_Notes with data sources, units, assumptions, and uncertainties.
Runbook: Insert 'Timekeeping and uncertainty' subsection (time zone, data sources, clock drift).

Runbook: Add explicit restart gates with measurable checks: C240_REFLUX_SP=1.80; C240_REBOILER_LIMIT<=8.4 MW; overhead valve mode=Auto; historian service account restored/validated; SIS independent/healthy; console privileges corrected; engineering credentials contained after evidence collection.
Runbook: Add short zoning/allowed-flows note and reiterate prohibition of live scans; specify offline/air-gapped analysis tools.
Verification enablement: Export CSV versions for each workbook sheet to ./artifacts to mitigate xlsx preview limitations.
Cross-referencing: Add workbook cell/row references (e.g., Timeline!B12) in runbook narrative for each key claim.
raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Tighten ATT&CK mapping justifications, make restart gates/timekeeping explicit, and provide verifiable visuals and CSV fallbacks to address verification and rubric weaknesses.

metadata_json.revision_goal: Strong reconstruction narrative and safety-first orientation. However, ATT&CK for ICS mapping is under-justified in visible materials, and several verification gates and documentation details are implied but not explicit. Spreadsheet visuals and mapping sheet cannot be verified from preview; runbook preview omits explicit, measurable restart gates and timekeeping assumptions.
